task_completion.description: Navigate to the Business Partner window and select the Agri-Tech account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere 'Business Partner' window is open, and the record for 'Agri-Tech' is actively selected or displayed in the form view.

task_completion.description: Update the credit limit for Agri-Tech to $15,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Customer tab of the Business Partner window for Agri-Tech, the 'Credit Limit' field displays '15000' or '15,000'.

task_completion.description: Change the payment terms for Agri-Tech to '2%10 Net 30'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Customer tab of the Business Partner window for Agri-Tech, the 'Payment Term' dropdown or field displays '2%10 Net 30'.

task_completion.description: Create a new standard sales order for Agri-Tech.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sales Order' window is open, a new record is created (Target Document Type is Standard Order), and the 'Business Partner' field is set to 'Agri-Tech'.

task_completion.description: Add Azalea Bush (quantity 8) to the sales order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Sales Order Line' tab, there is a saved line item with the 'Product' field showing 'Azalea Bush' and the 'Quantity' (or Qty Entered/Ordered) field showing '8'.

task_completion.description: Add Holly Bush (quantity 6) to the sales order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Sales Order Line' tab, there is a saved line item with the 'Product' field showing 'Holly Bush' and the 'Quantity' (or Qty Entered/Ordered) field showing '6'.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface running in a browser, rather than database queries (e.g., psql) or terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values like '15000', '2%10 Net 30', and product quantities are entered into the correct iDempiere input fields and dropdowns, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: The interface appears genuine and not manipulated via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout, fonts, and styling of the iDempiere interface remain consistent, and there are no visible browser developer tools open to manually edit the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Customer: 'Agri-Tech' (BP ID: 200000). Expected Credit Limit: 15000. Expected Payment Term: '2%10 Net 30' (Payment Term ID: 106). Order Line 1: Product 'Azalea Bush' (Product ID: 128), Quantity 8. Order Line 2: Product 'Holly Bush' (Product ID: 129), Quantity 6.
